doc_title: An Efficient Multimodal Learning Framework to Comprehend Consumer Preferences Using BERT and Cross-Attention

rule_hits.summary: Presents results from three studies comparing model architectures, pre-trained models, and the impact of token counts on prediction accuracy, supporting hypotheses on model perf...
Describes the proposed model architecture, evaluation methods, and data description, including the use of Yelp data for predicting ratings based on review texts and tabular data.
Acknowledges support from RIKEN AIP and Yelp for the study.
Reviews related work on attention mechanisms, Transformers, BERT, multimodal learning, consumer heterogeneity, and the research gap in applying machine learning to marketing con...
